items.text: US launches strikes on Iran after downing of American helicopter

@KobeissiLetter: BREAKING: China bought +10 tonnes of gold in May, the largest monthly addition since January 2025. This follows +8 tonnes acquired in April, marking their 3rd consecutive monthly net purchase.
